mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_ai_citation (session_id, source_type, content_id, source_id, chunk_id, source_title, fragment_summary, score, source_version) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{sourceType}, #{contentId}, #{sourceId}, #{chunkId}, #{sourceTitle}, #{fragmentSummary}, #{score}, #{sourceVersion})

INSERT INTO oa_ai_citation (session_id, source_type, content_id, source_id, chunk_id, source_title, fragment_summary, score, source_version) VALUES
(#{c.sessionId}, #{c.sourceType}, #{c.contentId}, #{c.sourceId}, #{c.chunkId}, #{c.sourceTitle}, #{c.fragmentSummary}, #{c.score}, #{c.sourceVersion})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_ai_citation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id ASC
